calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Continued To Mar-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Edward C. Singer, Jr., Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 3605 20th I1 LLC,
No appearance by defaulted defendant CHOCOLATIER BLUE, INC., CHOCOLATIER BLUE 2, INC., CHRIS BLUE,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-X dismissed without prejudice.
Witnesses: Lisa Levy and Justine Shoemaker sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $334,618.52
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,650.00
Costs: $1,516.38
Total Judgment in the amount of $340,694.90

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
